assets.title: Atrium Domain
assets.notes: Photorealistic generation-ship Atrium habitat. Tall hydroponic halls under steel ribs, soft canopy grow-lights, root-cables braided with conduits, pale brushed steel and soft teal foliage, clean laboratory lighting — bright room, not dark void. Live-action VFX plate look, real materials. No people, no robots in foreground, no anime, no illustration, no text, no logos.

assets.title: Reservoir Domain
assets.notes: Photorealistic cryo Reservoir bay aboard a generation ship. Frosted glass panes, stacked cryo tanks, luminous coolant channels, pale cyan reflections on clean deck plating, soft ice-blue and pearl materials. Bright laboratory lighting, not grimdark. Live-action VFX plate, real materials. No people, no anime, no illustration, no text.

assets.title: Core Domain
assets.notes: Photorealistic reactor Core gallery. Circular reactor ring, plasma conduits with soft amber shimmer, instrument banks, warm copper accents on pale steel, clean lab lighting — warm but not hellish fire. Live-action VFX plate, real materials. No people, no anime, no illustration, no text.

assets.title: Antenna Domain
assets.notes: Photorealistic Antenna relay deck. Observation spines and radio dish arrays facing a starfield, soft violet signal haze, pale deck plating with thin cyan instrument glow, clean bright interior against deep space outside. Live-action VFX plate, not neon cyberpunk, not anime. No people, no text.

assets.title: Hydroponic Hall
assets.notes: Photorealistic interior hydroponic hall on a generation ship — glass planters, soft canopy light, condensation on steel rails, pale teal and leaf green. Bright lab photography look. No people, no anime, no illustration.

assets.title: Root-Cable Garden
assets.notes: Photorealistic mezzanine garden where vines braid with power cables, soft instrument glow on pale panels, quiet aisle composition. Real materials. No people, no anime.

assets.title: Canopy Observatory
assets.notes: Photorealistic glass cupola above Hab canopy, starlight mixed with grow-lamps, soft condensation mist. Bright interior, live-action VFX plate. No people, no anime.

assets.title: Frost Glass Bay
assets.notes: Photorealistic frosted pane bay overlooking cryo tanks, pale cyan floor reflections, clean laboratory lighting. Real materials. No people, no anime.

assets.title: Coolant River
assets.notes: Photorealistic luminous coolant channel between catwalks, soft vapor, ice-blue instrument blink. Bright lab mood. No people, no anime.

assets.title: Cryo Vault Terrace
assets.notes: Photorealistic curved terrace of sealed vault doors, frost patterns on metal, soft amber beacon. Real materials. No people, no anime.

assets.title: Reactor Ring
assets.notes: Photorealistic circular reactor gallery with warm instrument amber, geometric rails, clean lab light — not hellfire. Live-action VFX plate. No people, no anime.

assets.title: Plasma Conduit Walk
assets.notes: Photorealistic bright corridor with transparent plasma tubes, soft shimmer, cool white overheads. Real materials. No people, no anime.

assets.title: Instrument Amber Hall
assets.notes: Photorealistic instrument banks facing a glowing core viewport, copper and amber readouts on pale steel. Live-action VFX plate. No people, no anime, no readable text.

assets.title: Observation Spine
assets.notes: Photorealistic long spine of viewports into deep space, violet signal haze outside, bright clean interior. Live-action VFX plate. No people, no anime.

assets.title: Void Dish Field
assets.notes: Photorealistic radio dish arrays on pale deck, soft purple instrument glow rings, starfield backdrop. Soft-sci-fi production design, not neon cyberpunk, not anime. No people.

assets.title: Signal Mist Gallery
assets.notes: Photorealistic gallery of translucent panels filled with luminous signal mist, thin cyan light vectors. Bright lab interior, real materials. No people, no anime, no readable text.
